message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS (Cumulation 1980–2018)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4588","justification":"Historical social, political, and cultural attitudes in Germany from 1980 onward; covers late 20th century (1980s, 1990s) and early 2000s, suitable for historical analysis of German society."},{"title":"National Socialist German Workers’ Party (NSDAP) Members in Munich 1920–1923 and 1925–1933","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8056","justification":"Historical dataset on early NSDAP membership in Germany; provides detailed individual‑level historical data, highly relevant for historical research on German political history even though the core period precedes 1950."},{"title":"Inequality in Public Goods Provision in Germany: Prussian Railway Construction 1848–1860 (District Level)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8820","justification":"Historical infrastructure and inequality dataset for Germany; though pre‑1950, it is explicitly historical and useful for long‑run analyses that can be linked to late‑20th‑century outcomes."},{"title":"History and Characteristics of Electoral Districts for the German Bundestag (13th–15th Electoral Periods)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5172","justification":"Provides historical information on German federal electoral districts for elections in the 1990s and early 2000s, directly matching the specified decades in Germany."},{"title":"British General Election Study 1964 – Cross‑Section Survey","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4319","justification":"Historical political attitudes and behavior in England/Great Britain in the 1960s; directly within the user’s time window and useful for historical analyses of mid‑20th‑century Britain."},{"title":"British Election Study 1974: February – Cross‑Section Survey","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4327","justification":"Elections and political behavior in Britain in the 1970s; offers historically situated survey data squarely within the requested decade for England/UK."},{"title":"British Election Study 1987: Post‑Election Cross‑Section Survey","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1940","justification":"Historical election‑related data for Britain in the 1980s; relevant for studying late‑20th‑century political history and public opinion in England/UK."},{"title":"US General Social Survey 1972–2018 (Cumulation) – GESIS Cross‑National GSS","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5280","justification":"Long‑running survey of the United States of America from 1972 through the 2000s, covering social change and historical trends across several requested decades."},{"title":"World Values Survey 1981–2014 Longitudinal File (Integrated)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5763","justification":"Includes repeated cross‑national surveys for Germany, Sweden, the United States, and the UK over multiple waves from the 1980s onward, enabling comparative historical analyses across the specified decades and countries."},{"title":"European Values Study 1981–2008 Longitudinal Data File","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4804","justification":"Historical value‑change dataset including Germany, Sweden, and the UK from the early 1980s into the 2000s; supports long‑term historical analyses of cultural and social change in several of the requested countries."}]}
